title: Spartan Weaponry - Bewitchment
description: Add Spartan weapon variants to Bewitchment.
body:
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/3KzkVIhK/images/af90552a7c14aba418c8adb5fa75860848aff5e8.png)

This Mod is a compatibility to Spartan Weaponry and Bewitchment which adds new weapon in Cold Iron.
These weapons are very powerful against demons (ghast and other demons of Bewitchment).

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/3KzkVIhK/images/25c2ff1427c64e462b033ccd56684466f848319c.png)

You ask yourself: "But why no silver weapon?".

Spartan Weaponry itself has silver weapons that can be crafted with the silver ingot of the mod.

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/3KzkVIhK/images/2dc19622a0fa25afd826270827e6e19eabcd8ccc.png)

Depedencies:

- Spartan Weaponry
- Bewitchment
